game.sudoku.controls: [↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→] Move Cursor [1-9] Enter Number [Space] Clear Current Cell [A] Undo [D] Jump [P] Change Difficulty [Z] Toggle Locator Lines [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.sudoku.description: Fill numbers 1-9 in the 9x9 grid, ensuring no repeats in each row, column, and 3x3 box.
game.sudoku.details:
f%Fill in the numbers to meet the success criteria.

{tc:yellow}Difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 1:{tc:clear} Easy, 30 empty cells
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 2:{tc:clear} Medium, 40 empty cells
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 3:{tc:clear} Hard, 50 empty cells
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 4:{tc:clear} Expert, 60 empty cells
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 5:{tc:clear} Evil, 70 empty cells

{tc:yellow}Press P to change difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Difficulty:{tc:clear} 1-5 difficulty

{tc:red}Generated puzzles may have multiple solutions!{tc:clear}

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move cursor
{tc:light_cyan}[1-9]{tc:clear} Enter number
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Clear current cell
{tc:light_cyan}[A]{tc:clear} Undo
{tc:light_cyan}[D]{tc:clear} Jump
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Change difficulty
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Toggle locator lines
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.sudoku.input_difficulty_hint: Enter difficulty number to change difficulty.
game.sudoku.input_jump_hint: Enter 'row col' to jump to coordinates.
game.sudoku.name: Sudoku
game.sudoku.runtime_ready: Fill the board to match the solution.
